description.value:
This kit includes all of the necessary implements to collect evidence, DNA, and other remains from any location that you investigate.

Proficiency with this kit lets you add your proficiency bonus to any skill checks you make to identify DNA, Finger prints, drugs, pills, chemicals, poisons and diseases.

While you have proficiency and access to this Kit you can do the following; Analyze Drugs, Chemicals, Poisons and Diseases, collect DNA & Fingerprints and compare findings.

Analyze (1 charge).

By spending 1 hour canvassing an area no larger than 10 x 10 feet, you are able to attempt to find and collect all material evidence in an area.

First, make a DC 15 Intelligence (Investigation) check.

On a success, you are able to find a single piece of evidence.

For every +5 you get over the listed DC you find an additional piece of material evidence (if any).

Evidence found in this manner is counted as whole or partial drug residue, chemicals or chemical residue, poisons or even mysterious biological substances.

Next, you spend another hour analyzing the evidence.

When you are analyzing something you must make a DC 10 + 1 for every day that has passed since the piece of evidence you are looking over was left behind Intelligence (Forensics) check.

This DC Can never be greater than 30.

If you would attempt to Analyze something that has been left in any hostile environment, you instead increase the DC by +1 for every hour that passes, instead of every day.

If you would attempt to analyze something that was left in a contained, pressurized or sterilized environment, you instead increase the DC by +1 for every week that passes.

If you pass the second check, you become aware of the makeup, composition, age of, and purpose for the evidence.

You record this data into a book of your choice found within the forensic kit.

Moving forward, when you would see, interact with or come across the source of the evidence or something similar (a similar drug or chemical), as a part of becoming aware of this new source make an Intelligence (Forensics) check vs a DC 15.

On a success, you are able to link the previous evidence found and this new source and form a connection (if any).

(Ex. You find a bloody knife, and analyze the discarded weapon, recording the DNA, fingerprints, hand used, and size of hand.

If you later encounter someone who's hand size, and grip is similar to that of the assumed holder of the knife, you make your forensics check, on a success, you become aware if the target is the original owner of or the holder of the knife in question.)

Gain a +1d4 bonus to Intelligence checks made with this kit.
